## Current instruction

Quote the exact section of `notetaker.md` you want to improve.

## Proposed change

Show the new wording.

## Why this is better

Explain what problem the current wording causes and how your version fixes it. Include a conversation transcript if possible.

## Testing

Did you test the new wording by uploading it to a Claude Project? Share results.
